Pod Template:
  Labels:       app=dd-in-house-mip-solver-node-master
                app.kubernetes.io/component=master
                app.kubernetes.io/name=dd-in-house-mip-solver-node
                app.kubernetes.io/part-of=des-distributed-solver
  Annotations:  kubectl.kubernetes.io/restartedAt: 2026-06-04T20:21:30Z
  Containers:
   solver:
    Image:           docker.io/library/rust:1.90-bookworm
    Port:            8117/TCP
    Host Port:       0/TCP
    SeccompProfile:  RuntimeDefault
    Command:
      /bin/bash
      -lc
    Args:
      set -euo pipefail
      export PATH=/usr/local/cargo/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
      checkout_git_ref() {
        local url="$1"
        local ref="$2"
        local dest="$3"
        rm -rf "${dest}"
        if git clone --depth 1 --branch "${ref}" "${url}" "${dest}"; then
          return 0
        fi
        rm -rf "${dest}"
        git clone --filter=blob:none "${url}" "${dest}"
        git -C "${dest}" fetch --depth 1 origin "${ref}"
        git -C "${dest}" checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD
      }
      source_root=/tmp/k8s-source
      if [ -z "${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL:-}" ]; then
        echo "MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL is required because pods build from an isolated /tmp checkout" >&2
        exit 1
      fi
      rm -rf /tmp/k8s-source
      if checkout_git_ref "${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL}" "${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_REF:-dev}" /tmp/k8s-source; then
        git -C /tmp/k8s-source config url.https://github.com/.insteadOf git@github.com:
        git -C /tmp/k8s-source config url.https://github.com/.insteadOf ssh://git@github.com/
        git -C /tmp/k8s-source submodule sync --recursive remote/submodules/discrete-event-system.rs
        git -C /tmp/k8s-source submodule update --init --depth 1 remote/submodules/discrete-event-system.rs
        if [ -n "${MIP_SOLVER_NODE_GIT_URL:-}" ]; then
          checkout_git_ref "${MIP_SOLVER_NODE_GIT_URL}" "${MIP_SOLVER_NODE_GIT_REF:-main}" /tmp/k8s-source/remote/deployments/mip-solver-node.rs
        else
          git -C /tmp/k8s-source submodule sync --recursive remote/deployments/mip-solver-node.rs
          git -C /tmp/k8s-source submodule set-url remote/deployments/mip-solver-node.rs https://github.com/ORESoftware/mip-solver-node.rs.git
          git -C /tmp/k8s-source submodule update --init --depth 1 remote/deployments/mip-solver-node.rs
        fi
        echo "[dd-in-house-mip-solver-node] source: cloned ${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL}@${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_REF:-dev}"
      else
        echo "[dd-in-house-mip-solver-node] source clone failed" >&2
        exit 1
      fi
      solver_src="${source_root}/remote/deployments/mip-solver-node.rs"
      if [ ! -f "${solver_src}/Cargo.toml" ]; then
        echo "solver source not found at ${solver_src}" >&2
        exit 1
      fi
      cd "${solver_src}"
      exec /usr/local/cargo/bin/cargo run --release --locked
      
    Limits:
      cpu:     2
      memory:  4Gi
    Requests:
      cpu:      1m
      memory:   64Mi
    Liveness:   http-get http://:http/healthz delay=0s timeout=5s period=30s #success=1 #failure=3
    Readiness:  http-get http://:http/readyz delay=0s timeout=3s period=5s #success=1 #failure=2
    Startup:    http-get http://:http/healthz delay=0s timeout=1s period=5s #success=1 #failure=180
    Environment:
      HOST:                                   0.0.0.0
      PORT:                                   8117
      HOME:                                   /tmp
      CARGO_HOME:                             /tmp/cargo
      CARGO_TARGET_DIR:                       /tmp/mip-solver-node-target
      CARGO_BUILD_JOBS:                       1
      MIP_SOLVER_NODE_ROLE:                   master
      NATS_URL:                               nats://dd-nats.messaging.svc.cluster.local:4222
      MIP_SOLVER_NATS_CONNECT_ATTEMPTS:       90
      MIP_SOLVER_NATS_CONNECT_RETRY_SECONDS:  2
      REDIS_URL:                              redis://dd-redis-cache.default.svc.cluster.local:6379/0
      MIP_SOLVER_REDIS_KEY_PREFIX:            dd:mip-solver
      MIP_SOLVER_COORDINATION_BACKENDS:       both
      MIP_SOLVER_LIVE_MUTEX_URL:              http://dd-rust-network-mutex.default.svc.cluster.local:6971
      MIP_SOLVER_LIVE_MUTEX_AUTH_TOKEN:       <set to the key 'LMX_AUTH_TOKEN' in secret 'dd-agent-secrets'>                          Optional: true
      RDS_DATABASE_URL:                       <set to the key 'RDS_DATABASE_URL' in secret 'dd-mip-solver-node-secrets'>              Optional: true
      AGENT_TASKS_RDS_DATABASE_URL:           <set to the key 'AGENT_TASKS_RDS_DATABASE_URL' in secret 'dd-mip-solver-node-secrets'>  Optional: true
      MIP_SOLVER_PG_POOL_SIZE:                4
      MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL:             https://github.com/ORESoftware/k8s-cluster.git
      MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_REF:             dev
      MIP_SOLVER_NODE_GIT_URL:                https://github.com/ORESoftware/mip-solver-node.rs.git
      MIP_SOLVER_NODE_GIT_REF:                main
      MIP_SOLVER_LP_MAX_ITERS:                10000
      MIP_SOLVER_MAX_SUBPROBLEMS:             256
      MIP_SOLVER_SPLIT_DEPTH:                 4
    Mounts:
      /tmp from tmp (rw)

   tmp:

  Tolerations:     <none>
